free_text: Elastic scattering and fusion of 9Be+208Pb:  density
function dependence of the double folding
renormalization
the 14UD Pelletron.
180 mug/cm2 208-Pb-Cl2 on a 15 mug/cm2 natural carbon
backing.
To provide an absolute normalization for the scattering
yield, two monitor detectors were used. These were
silicon surface barrier detectors, positioned at
~15 deg. to the beam.
Three silicon position sensitive
detector dE-E telescopes were employed. The passing
dE detectors were 69 um thick, and the stopping
E-detectors were 500 um thick.
No information about source of uncertainty.
optical model parameters were deduced at some
density model of 9-Be.
Fusion cross section was calculated too.
Data
tables in supplied material: E-PRVCAN-69-055404.
by F.Ch
BIB section updated. Correction was done,
according V.Zerkin remarks-missing pointer near
DATA-Header and other new Exfor rules.
SD: SF8=RTH added to MONITOR reaction code.
BIB updated. Correction in Subent 002.
SD: DATA-ERR pointer was changed (R -> E).
